area-1.dialogue: You wake up in the middle of the night to a strange noise. A shadow moves outside your window.

options.no-hint: You close the curtain and go back to sleep.
options.advance: The noise returns louder than before and now you cannot ignore it. You get up to check.

options.no-hint: A fox slips out of the shadows and runs off. You go back to bed.
options.advance: The figure shifts again and it looks too big to be an animal. You decide to take a closer look.

options.no-hint: You step outside and find a fox digging through the trash. It runs off and you head back inside.
options.advance: You move to another window for a better view. The figure moves again. You put on your shoes and head out.

area-2.dialogue: You stand on the front porch. The night is quiet and the shadow lingers near the road.

options.no-hint: You shut the door and the sound startles the figure. It runs off and you return to bed.
options.small-hint: You peek through the door crack. The figure is wearing a [HINT]. The door creaks and the figure runs off. You return to bed.
options.advance: You check the door peephole. The figure walks past and once they are far enough ahead you follow.

options.no-hint: The figure spots the top of your head and runs off before you can get a look. You return to bed.
options.small-hint: You back into a twig and it snaps. The figure runs but you catch a glimpse of their face. They are wearing a [HINT]. You return to bed.
options.advance: The figure walks past. They do not notice you but you fail to get a clear look. You follow down the road.

options.no-hint: The figure bolts away before you can make anything out. You return to bed.
options.small-hint: The figure stumbles as they run. You catch a small glimpse of their face. They are wearing a [HINT]. You return to bed.
options.advance: The figure panics and fumbles with something. You move closer to see.

area-3.dialogue: You are only a few meters behind the figure now.

options.no-hint: The figure turns the corner and disappears. You head home and go to bed.
options.advance: The figure jumps into a car. They are wearing a [HINT]. They drive off. You head home and go to bed.

options.no-hint: The figure hears you and sprints away. You head home and go to bed.
options.advance: You grab the figure by the shoulder and they twist free. You catch a glimpse of their face. They are wearing a [HINT]. They run off. You head home and go to bed.

options.no-hint: You chase after them but they escape. You head home and go to bed.
options.advance: You chase the figure to their car. They struggle with the door and you catch a look at their face. They are wearing a [HINT]. They speed away. You head home and go to bed.
